_comment: loc-source-guard allow-list. Paths are repo-relative globs; matched case-insensitive.
_xaml_attrs_user_visible: List of XAML attributes whose string literal value is considered user-visible and therefore must be a resource key, not a literal.
_xaml_attr_ignore_values: Values for the attributes above that should NOT be flagged (whitespace, single glyphs, format placeholders, numeric).
